```{=html}
<!-- Complex filter with OR - shows messy logic before when_any() -->
<script>
window.FOR_TITLE_PRE = 'filter(';
// Two groups of conditions joined by OR
window.FOR_COND_GROUPS = [
  {
    label: 'Group 1',
    text: '(species == "Adelie" & island == "Torgersen" & body_mass_g > 3700)',
    color: '#4a86c5'
  },
  {
    label: 'Group 2',
    text: '(species == "Gentoo" & body_mass_g > 5000)',
    color: '#e8853a'
  }
];
window.FOR_TITLE_POST = ')';
window.FOR_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3250'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', 'NA'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '4500'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5700'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '4450'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5700'],
];
window.FOR_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Which rows match which group (can match both, one, or neither)
window.FOR_MATCHES = [
  // Group 1: Adelie from Torgersen with body_mass_g > 3700
  [true, true, false, false, false, false, false, false],
  // Group 2: Gentoo with body_mass_g > 5000
  [false, false, false, false, false, true, false, true]
];
</script>
```

::: {.for-stage-wrap}
<div id="for-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .for-frag id="for-group-1"}
[]{.fragment .for-frag id="for-group-2"}
[]{.fragment .for-frag id="for-or"}
[]{.fragment .for-frag id="for-arrows"}
